prompt: A subway station platform with clean geometric design. Blue-and-white patterned tiles with chevron motifs cover the walls. A yellow safety line marks the platform edge. A train with open doors sits on the left track. A digital departure board with orange text displays schedule information overhead. A dark tunnel entrance is visible ahead. Flat, well-lit underground atmosphere. Behind the viewer, the platform extends past a row of metal benches and a vending machine cluster toward a staircase leading up to the exit with a green directional sign. To the left inside the train, rows of orange seats and overhead grab handles are visible through the open doors. To the right, a tiled wall map of the transit system is mounted next to an emergency intercom box. First-person viewer. First-person view standing on the platform behind the yellow safety line, looking toward the tunnel entrance and departure board. No held objects.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A subway station platform with clean geometric design. Blue-and-white patterned tiles with chevron motifs cover the walls. A yellow safety line marks the platform edge. A train with open doors sits on the left track. A digital departure board with orange text displays schedule information overhead. A dark tunnel entrance is visible ahead. The station has a flat, well-lit underground atmosphere. To the left inside the train, rows of orange seats and overhead grab handles are visible through the open doors.

To the right, a tiled wall map of the transit system is mounted next to an emergency intercom box.
